title: <div><h1>Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Merchant Industries
content:
Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Merchant Industries Access


1. Introduction


This Statement of Work (SOW) establishes a formal agreement between UltiTool Media LLC. ("Service Provider") and Merchant Industries Access ("Client"), focused on lead generation through targeted advertising on Meta platforms. This specialized campaign aims to connect the Client with potential customers seeking merchant cash advance services, leveraging Meta’s extensive reach for optimal lead generation.

2. Scope of Work


Paid Advertising on Meta Platforms:

Campaign Strategy Development: The Service Provider will develop a comprehensive ad strategy tailored to the merchant cash advance market, focusing on Meta platforms (Facebook and Instagram) to maximize lead generation. This includes audience research, ad creative development, and messaging that resonates with the target demographic.

Ad Creation and Management: Implementing the campaign strategy through creating compelling ad visuals and copy, followed by meticulous management of the ad placements to ensure optimal performance and cost-efficiency.
